# Engine


## Engine configuration

How the engine is configured at startup: file layout, env-var expansion, and built-in defaults.

## Configuration file structure

The shape of `config.yaml` and how workers are declared.

## Environment variable expansion

Using `${VAR:default}` syntax to swap values per environment.

## Built-in defaults

What `iii --use-default-config` loads when no config file is provided.
